title: Hero Proof
description: Earn a medal after winning a raid, and  remind villagers to remember you as a hero!
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!
---
I always wonder why villagers would forget that **I saved their village**! So I made this.

Now, when you achieve The adventurement "hero of the village", you will not only gain the hero buff, but also a custom emerald named "Hero Proof".

With this in your main hand, you will continually gain the hero buff, and villagers will give you discount.
